summary: Global stock markets experienced a relief rally on March 23rd following the postponement of US attacks on Iranian power plants. S&P 500 climbed 1.1%, while Brent crude fell 10% to $101. Art market trends highlight a 'Transvertical' shift, combining luxury and digital assets, with strong regional growth in the Middle East.
key_events: S&P 500 rose 1.1% on March 23rd after US-Iran de-escalation signals.
Brent crude fell 10% to $101 per barrel.
Energy sector +33% YTD, while Software sector -20%.
Art world: Whitney Biennial (AI/climate focus) and TEFAF Maastricht success; focus on Middle Eastern regional expansion.
